test_cases.description: Verifies skill correctly distinguishes between referral (existing customers) and affiliate (external publishers) programs
test_cases.input: Should I create a referral program or an affiliate program for my design tool?

test_cases.description: Verifies skill recommends high-intent trigger moments for asking customers to refer
test_cases.input: When is the best time to ask users of my project management tool to refer colleagues?

test_cases.description: Verifies skill mentions LTV and churn improvements for referred customers
test_cases.input: Why should I invest in a referral program vs paid ads?
expected_output_excludes: referrals are always worse than ads
